# P26F3-5 Operator Handoff Packet — TWSE/MOPS MonthlyRevenue Source Acquisition

**Version:** P26F3-5-HARDRESET  
**Status:** AWAITING_OPERATOR_ACTION  
**Generated by:** Agent (P26F3-5 pipeline pre-flight complete)

---

## 1. Mission

Acquire official TWSE/MOPS monthly revenue (月營收) CSV data for:
- 5 target periods: **2025-09, 2025-10, 2025-11, 2025-12, 2026-01**
- 25 target symbols (listed below)

This packet is designed to be followed by a non-engineering operator without additional guidance.

---

## 2. Target Symbols (25 symbols — exactly as in P3/P19 corpus)

```
0055, 00712, 00738U, 00830, 00891, 00903,
1210, 1308, 1314, 1319, 1326, 1402, 1434,
1513, 1536, 1560, 1598, 1605, 1710, 1717,
1802, 2317, 2330, 2454, 6415
```

---

## 3. Official Source URLs

### 3A. TWSE (Taiwan Stock Exchange) Monthly Revenue

**URL:** https://www.twse.com.tw/zh/trading/statistics/monthlyRevenue.html  
*(URL TBD — operator must verify this is the current active page; if URL has changed, search for "月營收" on https://www.twse.com.tw)*

Alternative / candidate search path:
- https://www.twse.com.tw/rwd/zh/afterTrading/BWIBBU_d.html → look for 月營收 section
- TWSE OpenAPI: https://openapi.twse.com.tw/ → search for "monthlyRevenue" or "月營收"

### 3B. MOPS (Market Observation Post System) Monthly Revenue

**URL:** https://mops.twse.com.tw/mops/web/t05st10_1  
*(URL TBD — operator must verify; if URL has changed, navigate to https://mops.twse.com.tw and search for 月營收 / 每月營業收入彙總表)*

Alternative / candidate search path:
- https://mops.twse.com.tw → 財務報告 → 月營收

> **Note to operator:** The above URLs are based on known TWSE/MOPS navigation structure as of early 2026. If the exact pages have moved, use the keyword "月營收" (monthly revenue) on the respective websites. If you cannot confirm the URLs, mark them as **URL TBD** and escalate to CTO before downloading.

## 4. Target Months and Expected Data

| Month | Period | Expected Release Date | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Sep 2025 | 2025-09 | ~2025-10-10 | TWSE requires release by 10th of following month |
| Oct 2025 | 2025-10 | ~2025-11-10 | |
| Nov 2025 | 2025-11 | ~2025-12-10 | |
| Dec 2025 | 2025-12 | ~2026-01-10 | |
| Jan 2026 | 2026-01 | ~2026-02-10 | |

---

## 5. Expected Filename Pattern

Files must be named using the following pattern (already in drop-zone EXPECTED_FILENAMES.md):

```
twse_monthly_revenue_YYYY_MM.csv
```

Examples:
- `twse_monthly_revenue_2025_09.csv`
- `twse_monthly_revenue_2025_10.csv`
- `twse_monthly_revenue_2025_11.csv`
- `twse_monthly_revenue_2025_12.csv`
- `twse_monthly_revenue_2026_01.csv`

Combined format (alternative): `twse_monthly_revenue_2025_09_to_2026_01.jsonl`

---

## 6. Required CSV Schema

Each CSV file must have the following columns (matching drop-zone EXPECTED_SCHEMA.json):

```
stockId,year,month,revenue,releaseDate,releaseDateSource,releaseDateConfidence,sourceName,sourceFileName
```

| Column | Type | Example | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| stockId | string | `2330` | Must match target symbol list exactly |
| year | integer | `2025` | 4-digit year |
| month | integer | `9` | 1–12 |
| revenue | number | `123456789` | Monthly revenue in TWD (no commas) |
| releaseDate | date | `2025-10-10` | Actual or inferred release date |
| releaseDateSource | string | `EXPLICIT` or `INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH` | Use EXPLICIT if confirmed from MOPS |
| releaseDateConfidence | string | `HIGH` or `LOW_TO_MEDIUM` | HIGH if date is from official source |
| sourceName | string | `TWSE` or `MOPS` | Must be one of: TWSE, MOPS, OFFICIAL, MANUAL |
| sourceFileName | string | `twse_monthly_revenue_2025_09.csv` | Name of the source file |

**Forbidden fields** (must NOT appear in CSV): `outcomePrice`, `returnPct`, `realizedReturnClass`

---

## 7. Drop-zone Path (Absolute)

```
/Users/kelvin/Kelvin-WorkSpace/Stock-Prediction-System/data/manual/monthly-revenue/p26f3-2-dropzone/
```

Place exactly the CSV files matching the filename pattern above into this directory.

---

## 8. Post-Download Verification Commands

After downloading, run these commands to verify:

### 8a. SHA256 checksum (record for audit trail)

```bash
cd /Users/kelvin/Kelvin-WorkSpace/Stock-Prediction-System
shasum -a 256 data/manual/monthly-revenue/p26f3-2-dropzone/twse_monthly_revenue_2025_09.csv
shasum -a 256 data/manual/monthly-revenue/p26f3-2-dropzone/twse_monthly_revenue_2025_10.csv
shasum -a 256 data/manual/monthly-revenue/p26f3-2-dropzone/twse_monthly_revenue_2025_11.csv
shasum -a 256 data/manual/monthly-revenue/p26f3-2-dropzone/twse_monthly_revenue_2025_12.csv
shasum -a 256 data/manual/monthly-revenue/p26f3-2-dropzone/twse_monthly_revenue_2026_01.csv
```

### 8b. Quick row count check

```bash
wc -l data/manual/monthly-revenue/p26f3-2-dropzone/twse_monthly_revenue_2025_09.csv
```

Expected: at least 26 lines (1 header + 25 symbol rows)

### 8c. Run drop-zone conditional scan

```bash
node scripts/run-p26f3-5-dropzone-conditional-scan.js
```

Expected output: `candidateSourceFiles: 5` and `acceptedRows: 125` (if all 5 files × 25 symbols)

---

## 9. One-Time Execution: After Files Are Placed

Run in this exact order:

```bash
# Step 1: Verify scan (read-only — no DB write)
node scripts/run-p26f3-5-dropzone-conditional-scan.js

# Step 2: Review scan results
cat outputs/online_validation/p26f3_5_dropzone_scan_result.json

# Step 3: If acceptedRows >= 100 and safetyGate.pass = true → escalate to engineering
# Engineering will run P26F4 with explicit approval token:
# P26F4_APPROVE_HISTORICAL_MONTHLY_REVENUE_IMPORT_ONLY

# DO NOT run import without engineering approval.
```

---

## 10. Expected Success Classification

After placing files and running scan:

```
P26F3_5_PIPELINE_PREFLIGHT_COMPLETE_OPERATOR_DROPPED_FILES_AWAITING_IMPORT_APPROVAL
```

After engineering runs P26F4 import gate:

```
P26F4_HISTORICAL_MONTHLY_REVENUE_IMPORT_COMPLETE
```

---

## 11. Expected Failure Classifications and Next Steps

| Classification | Meaning | Next Step |
|---|---|---|
| `P26F3_5_SOURCE_NOT_PROVIDED` | No files in drop-zone | Place TWSE CSV files per Section 7 |
| `P26F3_5_PIPELINE_PREFLIGHT_PARTIAL` | Some validator failures | Check `p26f3_5_dropzone_scan_result.json` for rejected rows |
| `VALIDATOR_REJECTED` | Row schema mismatch | Fix CSV schema to match Section 6 |
| `PERIOD_NOT_IN_TARGET` | Wrong month in filename | Ensure file covers 2025-09 to 2026-01 |
| `SYMBOL_NOT_IN_TARGET` | Unknown stockId | Remove non-target symbols or verify symbol ID |
| `FORBIDDEN_FIELD_DETECTED` | CSV contains forbidden field | Remove `outcomePrice`/`returnPct`/`realizedReturnClass` columns |

---

## 12. Prohibited Actions

The following are **strictly prohibited**:

- ❌ Manually editing CSV cell values (revenue figures must be directly from TWSE/MOPS)
- ❌ Merging multiple months into one file without using the `.jsonl` combined format
- ❌ Renaming `releaseDateSource` to `INFERRED_*` if the actual release date is known (use `EXPLICIT`)
- ❌ Adding columns not in the schema (especially `outcomePrice`, `returnPct`, `realizedReturnClass`)
- ❌ Placing synthetic fixture files (`*_synthetic.csv`) into the production drop-zone
- ❌ Running DB import without explicit approval token from engineering
- ❌ Fabricating revenue figures

---

## 13. Approval Token (Engineering Use Only)

The following token is required for P26F4 import gate. **Do not use without engineering approval.**

```
P26F4_APPROVE_HISTORICAL_MONTHLY_REVENUE_IMPORT_ONLY
```

This token is **not provided** in P26F3-5. P26F4 is the next round after operator provides files.

---

## 14. Contact

If URLs in Section 3 cannot be confirmed or data is unavailable:
- Escalate to CTO for TWSE/MOPS account access
- Note: Agent cannot auto-download from TWSE/MOPS (no external API access in this system)
